title: Outdoor Solar Garden Light
description: The SLSUN-9900 Outdoor Solar Garden Light is a compact and energy-efficient 3.2W fixture designed to add decorative and functional lighting to outdoor areas. Featuring a 3-in-1 CCT option and durable body construction, it provides versatile illumination while ensuring reliable performance.

details.Product Details: The SLSUN-9900 offers a balanced mix of style and practicality, perfect for modern gardens, patios, and pathways. With its 3-in-1 CCT, it adapts to various lighting moods.
details.Premium Construction: Finished in black, this fixture is made with strong and durable materials that withstand outdoor conditions. Its IP65 rating ensures protection from dust and rain.
details.Lighting Performance: Operating at 3.2W, it provides bright yet efficient lighting. The 3-in-1 CCT feature allows flexible color temperature settings to match different ambiances.
details.Easy Installation: Compact in size at 126 × H51.8MM, the light is simple to mount and ideal for outdoor decorative or pathway applications.
details.Versatile Application: Suitable for residential gardens, resorts, pathways, and landscapes where energy-efficient solar lighting enhances beauty and safety.

title: Outdoor Solar Garden Light

details.Lighting Performance: Operating at 3.2W, the light provides a warm 3000K output that is ideal for creating cozy and inviting environments.
details.Easy Installation: With a compact build of 140 × 128 × 95MM, this model is easy to set up and ensures flexibility in outdoor applications.
details.Versatile Application: Perfect for walkways, gardens, patios, and resorts, offering a blend of elegance, efficiency, and functionality.

title: Outdoor Solar Garden Light

details.Product Details: The SL SUN-9906PL-6000K delivers strong lighting for pathways, gardens, and commercial outdoor projects. Its solar-powered design makes it eco-friendly and sustainable.
details.Premium Construction: Built with durable materials in a black finish, it ensures longevity. The IP65 rating provides protection against dust and rain, making it perfect for outdoor conditions.

title: Outdoor Solar Garden Light

title: Automatic Sensor Based Solar Garden Bollard Light
description: The SLR BL 9999 Automatic Sensor Based Solar Garden Bollard Light is an advanced outdoor lighting solution that combines style, efficiency, and functionality. Powered entirely by solar energy, it delivers reliable 2W illumination with a warm 3000K glow, making it perfect for enhancing the beauty and safety of pathways, gardens, and landscapes. Its automatic sensor ensures effortless operation by detecting ambient light conditions, switching on at dusk and off at dawn, providing energy savings and convenience. With a height of 500MM and a sleek modern design, it blends seamlessly into any outdoor environment while offering dependable performance.

details.Product Details: The bollard light is designed to add both aesthetic appeal and functional illumination to outdoor spaces. Its warm 3000K lighting creates a cozy and inviting atmosphere, making it ideal for walkways, driveways, lawns, and garden areas. The automatic sensor enhances usability, eliminating the need for manual switching while optimizing energy usage.
details.Premium Construction: Crafted with durable materials and finished in classic black, the SLR BL 9999 is engineered to withstand outdoor challenges. The IP54 rating ensures protection against dust and water splashes, allowing it to perform reliably in all weather conditions throughout the year.
details.Lighting Performance: With a 2W output and efficient optical design, the bollard light offers balanced illumination suitable for decorative and functional outdoor lighting. The integrated automatic sensor makes it energy-efficient and user-friendly, ensuring that light is available only when needed.
details.Easy Installation: The sleek 500MM size makes it convenient to install in various outdoor locations without requiring complicated wiring or professional setup. Its solar-powered operation further reduces installation costs and maintenance needs.
details.Versatile Application: The Automatic Sensor Based Solar Garden Bollard Light is ideal for residential gardens, commercial landscapes, resorts, parks, and modern outdoor designs. Its stylish profile adds elegance while the sensor-based system provides safety, sustainability, and enhanced nighttime visibility.
